dimension_results.raw_response:
ISSUE_1_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that the receipt number is missing. The extracted data shows "receipt_number": null, confirming this issue is factually grounded.

ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that the VAT amount is not clearly listed. The extracted data shows "tax_amount": null, confirming this issue is factually grounded.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that transportation expenses are subject to taxation according to the compliance rules. The extracted data confirms this is an Uber receipt for transportation (€16.94), and the compliance policy states "When employee uses public transport, the amount of the expense must be justified by an invoice or equivalent document. Otherwise, €0.19 per kilometre travelled plus toll and parking costs that are justified."

ISSUE_4_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that additional documentation is required for mileage claims. The compliance rules state "Employee must report date, starting point, end point, number of km and detail the business purpose. Screenshot/printout of the travel route using GoogleMaps or similar site required. Report must be signed both by employee and employer. Electronic signature is allowed."

ISSUE_5_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. This is directly stated in the compliance rules: "Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient, hard copy not required. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice."

CONFIDENCE: 100

ISSUES: None. All issues identified by the AI are factually grounded in the provided data and compliance rules.

SUMMARY: The AI response is completely factually grounded. All five issues identified are directly supported by the extracted data and compliance rules. The AI correctly identified missing receipt number, unclear VAT amount, taxation requirements for transportation expenses, and additional documentation requirements for mileage claims and expense submissions.

The system accurately identified that this Uber receipt falls under transportation expenses that are subject to taxation according to the compliance rule that states "When employee uses public transport, the amount of the expense must be justified by an invoice or equivalent document."

ISSUE_4_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The issue regarding additional documentation for mileage claims is correctly categorized as "Standards & Compliance | Follow-up Action Identified." The system accurately identified that for transportation/travel expenses with GoGlobal, additional documentation is required including details about the journey and purpose.
